name: ObservabilityIndex
description: Live LLMOps cost and reliability benchmark. Inference pricing, latency, error rates, and throughput across 25+ providers, updated every 6 hours. Real-time production monitoring data.
rai:dataCollection: Real-time inference data collected via API probes to 25+ LLM providers. Pricing data scraped from official provider pages. All public sources.
rai:dataBiases: Coverage weighted toward major commercial providers. Smaller or regional providers may be underrepresented. Latency measurements depend on probe location.
rai:dataLimitations: Latency measurements are from specific probe locations and may not reflect all regions
Pricing data may lag behind provider changes
Error rates are sampled and may not capture all outage events
Throughput measurements depend on request complexity

distribution.name: ObservabilityIndex Latest CSV
distribution.description: Full benchmark dataset in CSV format, updated every 6 hours

distribution.name: ObservabilityIndex Latest JSON
distribution.description: Full benchmark dataset in JSON format, updated every 6 hours

distribution.name: Documentation
distribution.description: Primary dataset documentation with schema, methodology, and usage instructions
